stemHtml: What is the appropriate Performance Class for a multi-engine jet aircraft with a Maximum Operational Passenger Seating Configuration (MOPSC) of 7 and a maximum all-up mass (MAUM) of 4183 kg?

options.a: Class A, because all jets are in Class A.
options.b: Class C, because the MAUM is less than 5700 kg.
options.c: Class B, because the MOPSC is less than 9.
